scripts.text:
TRUNCATE TABLE ZML.ERP_CHECKS_PAYMENTS_DETAIL;

INSERT INTO ZML.ERP_CHECKS_PAYMENTS_DETAIL
(InvoiceDocType	,
InvoiceRefNbr	,
InvoiceStatus	,
ApplicationDate	,
ApplicationPeriod	,
PaymentReferenceNumber	,
Vendor	,
PaymentMethod	,
InvoicePayID	,
CashAccount	,
PaymentDescription	,
PaymentAmount	,
InvoiceBranch	,
Branch	,
PayAmount	,
PaymentStatus	,
CashDiscountDate	,
PaymentTerms	,
AmountPaid	,
Balance	,
InvoiceDescription	,
InvoicePostingPeriod	,
VendorReference	,
VendorClass	,
VendorClassDescription	,
Vendor_ID	,
VendorName	,
DueDate	,
CompanyName	,
CashDiscount	,
ReferenceNumber	,
DocumentType	,
MissedDiscountFlag	,
InvoiceDate	,
InvoiceCreatedDate	,
PaymentOnTimeStatus	

)



SELECT 
InvoiceType	,
InvoiceRefNbr	,
InvoiceStatus	,
ApplicationDate	,
ApplicationPeriod	,
PaymentRef	,
Vendor	,
PaymentMethod	,
InvoicePayID	,
CashAccount	,
Description	,
PaymentAmount	,
InvoiceBranch	,
Branch	,
PayAmount	,
Status	,
CashDiscountDate	,
PaymentTerm	,
AmountPaid	,
Balance	,
InvoiceDescription	,
InvoicePostingPeriod	,
VendorReference	,
VendorClass	,
VendorClassDescription	,
Vendor_ID	,
VendorName	,
DueDate	,
CompanyName	,
CashDiscount	,
ReferenceNbr	,
Type	,
MissedDiscountFlag	,
InvoiceDate	,
InvoiceCreatedDate	,
PaymentOnTimeStatus	
FROM 
(
		Select 
		i.Type as InvoiceType,
		i.ReferenceNbr as InvoiceRefNbr,
		i.Status as InvoiceStatus,
		p.PaymentDate as ApplicationDate,
		p.FinPeriod as ApplicationPeriod,
		p.PaymentRef,
		CONCAT(v.VendorID,'-',v.VendorName) as Vendor,
		p.PaymentMethod,
		i.PayTypeID as InvoicePayID,
		p.CashAccount,
		p.Description,
		p.PaymentAmount,
		i.Branch as InvoiceBranch,
		p.Branch,
		CASE WHEN p.Status='Closed' then pl.CurrentAdjustAmt
		ELSE i.Amount END as PayAmount,
		p.Status,
		pl.CashDiscountDate,
		CONCAT(i.TermsID,'-',i.TermsID_Description) as PaymentTerm,
		CASE 
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and i.DueDate is not null then pl.CurrentAdjustAmt
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and i.DueDate is null then pl.CurrentAdjustAmt*(-1)
		WHEN i.Type='Debit Adj.' then i.Amount*(-1)
		ELSE 0 END as AmountPaid,
		
		i.Balance,
		i.Description as InvoiceDescription,
		i.PostingPeriod as InvoicePostingPeriod,
		i.VendorRef as VendorReference,
		v.VendorClass,
		v.VendorClassDescription,
		v.VendorID as Vendor_ID,
		v.VendorName,
		i.DueDate,
		-- ********* Change Here ***********
		CASE WHEN o.CompanyName='Max Home' THEN 'FHIA, LLC' ELSE o.CompanyName END AS CompanyName,
		i.CashDiscount,
		p.ReferenceNbr,
		p.Type,
		CASE 
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and DATEDIFF(dd,p.PaymentDate,pl.CashDiscountDate)<0 and i.CashDiscount>0 then 'Y'
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and DATEDIFF(dd,p.PaymentDate,pl.CashDiscountDate)>=0 and i.CashDiscount>0 then 'N' 
		else 'NA' END as MissedDiscountFlag,
		
		i.Date as InvoiceDate,
		i.createdOn as InvoiceCreatedDate,
		
		CASE 
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and DATEDIFF(dd,p.PaymentDate,i.DueDate)>0 THEN 'Paid Before Due Date'
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and DATEDIFF(dd,p.PaymentDate,i.DueDate)=0 THEN 'Paid on Due Date'
		WHEN p.Status='Closed' and DATEDIFF(dd,p.PaymentDate,i.DueDate)<0  THEN 'Late Payment'
		ELSE 'NA' END as PaymentOnTimeStatus
		
		from ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i left join ODS.ERP_VENDOR_MASTER v on i.Vendor=v.VendorID
		left join ODS.ERP_BILLS_PAYMENTS_LINK pl on i.Type=pl.InvoiceDocType and i.ReferenceNbr=pl.InvoiceRefNbr
		left join ODS.ERP_AP_PAYMENT p on pl.PaymentDocType=p.Type and pl.PaymentRefNbr=p.ReferenceNbr
		left join ZML.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on i.Branch=b.BranchCode
		left join ZML.DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION o on b.CompanyID=o.CompanyID
		Where CAST(RIGHT(i.PostingPeriod,4) as INT)>=2024 and (pl.PaymentDocType Not IN ('Refund','VQC','Voided Payment','Vendor Refund','Voided Check','Voided Refund') or pl.PaymentDocType is NULL)
		and i.Type!='QCK'
		
		) M1
